# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31    # enable latest serverless features, optional. default is AWSTemplateFormatVersion in new cloudformation versions and can be removed once supported by all template types that have no functional change  if you don't require it then just leave this commented out

Not required in the template, and will default as "AWSCloudFormationStack-xyz" for blank prefixed stack sets or if not specified otherwise
  MySNSTopicName :                                   # Required parameter - SNS topic name to use. Default is null (defaults are set when creating a new resource).
